name: Aalborg Boldspilklub A/S
summary: Aalborg Boldspilklub A/S engages in the sports and entertainment activities in Denmark. The company operates a professional football club; and Aalborg Portland Park stadium. It offers tickets to football games; and merchandise. The company also provides toy clothes, collections, clothing, children toys, and accessories online. Aalborg Boldspilklub A/S was founded in 1885 and is based in Aalborg, Denmark.
